x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Project milestone data enables Now Assist SPM to identify schedule risk and provide AI-driven delivery predictions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Define milestones for all active projects and keep completion dates current. Target: <10% of active milestones overdue. Now Assist SPM uses milestone data for AI schedule risk prediction and corrective action recommendations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cce
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Project milestone data enables Now Assist SPM to identify schedule risk and provide AI-driven delivery predictions.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Project Milestone Tracking</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("pm_milestone");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table pm_milestone not found", finding: "Project Milestone table (pm_milestone) is not available. Verify the Project Management plugin is active." };
    }
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("pm_milestone");
    gaTotal.addQuery("active", true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No active milestones found", finding: "No active milestones on this instance. Milestone tracking cannot be assessed." };
    }
    var today = new GlideDate();
    today.setValue(gs.nowDateTime());
    var todayStr = today.getValue();
    var gaLate = new GlideAggregate("pm_milestone");
    gaLate.addQuery("active", true);
    gaLate.addQuery("end_date", "<", todayStr);
    gaLate.addQuery("percent_complete", "<", 100);
    gaLate.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaLate.query();
    var lateCount = gaLate.next() ? parseInt(gaLate.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var latePct = Math.round((lateCount / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = total + " active milestones | " + lateCount + " overdue (" + latePct + "%)";
    if (total >= 20 && latePct <= 10) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: total + " active milestones with only " + latePct + "% overdue. Now Assist SPM has healthy schedule data for AI delivery prediction and risk identification." };
    } else if (latePct <= 25) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: lateCount + " overdue milestones (" + latePct + "% of active). Now Assist SPM schedule risk predictions will reflect existing delivery delays." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: lateCount + " overdue milestones (" + latePct + "% of active). High overdue rate indicates schedule data quality issues that will reduce Now Assist SPM AI delivery prediction accuracy." };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>SPM</module>
<number>CHK0006099</number>
<order>80</order>
<remediation_guidance>Define milestones for all active projects and keep completion dates current. Target: <10% of active milestones overdue. Now Assist SPM uses milestone data for AI schedule risk prediction and corrective action recommendations.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cce</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
